name: Vivek Reddy Eluka
headline: M.S. Computer Science @ Arizona State University

Experienced in developing machine learning models, RAG pipelines, LLM-based applications, and computer vision systems, with hands-on expertise in model optimization, deployment, and full-stack integration.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (CGPA: 8.16)

research.title: Multi‑Attention and Quantization‑Aware YOLO Framework for Real‑Time Surface Defect Detection on Edge Devices
highlights: Built an enhanced YOLOv11‑based object detection model using attention mechanisms to improve detection of small surface defects.
Prepared and unified multiple industrial defect datasets by cleaning annotations and applying data augmentation techniques.
Obtained 91.3% mAP@0.5 with stable validation performance, showing strong generalization across defect categories.

projects.title: AskTheSite: Website QA Chatbot
projects.subtitle: Question answering over any public website
projects.description: RAG‑based chatbot that answers natural‑language questions using content scraped from a target website.
highlights: Built using LangChain + FAISS with Mistral‑7B via Together.ai.
Implemented automated web scraping, chunking, and an interactive Gradio UI.

projects.title: WrapIt: Text Summarizer
projects.subtitle: Abstractive summarization for text, PDFs, and URLs
projects.description: Abstractive summarizer built on T5/BART with a configurable Gradio interface.
highlights: Supports text, PDF, and URL inputs.

projects.title: AIroma: Smart Café Chatbot
projects.subtitle: Domain chatbot for ordering + table availability
projects.description: Lightweight LLM chatbot to manage food orders, table availability, and FAQs.
highlights: Uses lightweight LLMs locally via Ollama.
Real‑time menu recommendations and order tracking via Flask + REST APIs.

projects.title: OCR and Document Search Web Application
projects.subtitle: Bilingual OCR + keyword search with highlighting
projects.description: OCR pipeline with layout‑aware extraction and document search with visual highlighting.
highlights: Implemented bilingual OCR using OpenCV and EasyOCR.
Enabled keyword search with visual highlighting.

projects.title: InnSight: Immersive Hotel Booking Website
projects.subtitle: Gesture‑controlled booking + 360° exploration
projects.description: Gesture‑controlled booking workflow with 360° panoramic room exploration and real‑time communication.
highlights: Authentication, booking workflows, and real‑time communication with MongoDB + Socket.IO.

projects.title: EEG Classification Using EEGNet
projects.subtitle: Motor imagery classification with EEGNet
projects.description: EEG preprocessing with MNE and EEGNet‑based deep learning for motor imagery classification.
highlights: Improved performance with regularization, early stopping, and learning rate scheduling.
